The PingResult type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
HasPluginErrors
IsWaitingToStartUpdate
Returns a flag indicating whether an update process will begin soon, meaning that the service may become unavailable.
NoDbConnection
Returns a flag indicating if the API could not be correctly initialized.
